title: Rockwall
description: A highly configurable, feature-rich chat plugin
body:
**This description has not been updated for V2**

# Rockwall

A highly configurable, *feature-rich chat plugin*. Rockwall is designed to be as customizable as possible

## Features

Rockwall has features some similar chat plugins do not

- Party/group system
- Fully configurable hover and click events
- Hex/RGB Colour support
- Custom formats (determined by permission)
- Configurable messages
- Discord-like emojis like :shrug: or :sword:
- Mentions or "pinging" using @
- Chatrooms (ex. Staff chat)
- And more on the way!

Your reviews and ratings help me improve and fix bugs and issues!
Feature requests are available via GitHub Issues.

[SpigotMC Page](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/rockwall.103709/)
